title: Cloud Classification 2016-present (raster 20 m), Europe, daily
description: The Cloud Classification (CC) product is generated in NRT for the entire EEA38+UK area based on optical satellite data from the Sentinel-2 constellation. The product provides the extent of clouds and cloud shadows with a pixel spacing of 20 m x 20 m. Cloud detection is performed at a 120m spatial resolution.

links.title: Legal notice on the use of Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) data
Homepage of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service

cdse-s3.title: Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem S3
cdse-s3.description: This endpoint provides access to EO data which is stored on the object storage of both CloudFerro Cloud and OpenTelekom Cloud (OTC). See the [documentation](https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/APIs/S3.html) for more information, including how to get credentials.

creodias-s3.title: CREODIAS S3
creodias-s3.description: Comprehensive Earth Observation Data (EODATA) archive offered by CREODIAS as a commercial part of CDSE, designed to provide users with access to a vast repository of satellite data without predefined quota limits

QAFLAGS.title: Quality Flags (QAFLAGS)
QAFLAGS.description: Bitmask layer with pixel quality flags

classification:bitfields.name: mono_temporal
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether cloud pixels were detected through the mono-temporal approach

classes.name: not_mono_temporal
classes.description: Cloud was not detected through the mono-temporal approach

classes.name: mono_temporal
classes.description: Cloud was detected through the mono-temporal approach

classification:bitfields.name: multi_temporal
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether cloud pixels were detected through the multi-temporal approach

classes.name: not_multi_temporal
classes.description: Cloud was not detected through the multi-temporal approach

classes.name: multi_temporal
classes.description: Cloud was detected through the multi-temporal approach

classes.name: not_thin_cloud
classes.description: The pixel was not identified as thin cloud

classes.name: thin_cloud
classes.description: The pixel was identified as thin cloud

classification:bitfields.name: cloud_shadow_from_cloud_in_image
classification:bitfields.description: Cloud shadow mask cast from a cloud visible in the image

classes.name: not_cloud_shadow_from_cloud_in_image
classes.description: The pixel is not a cloud shadow cast from a cloud visible in the image

classes.name: cloud_shadow_from_cloud_in_image
classes.description: The pixel is a cloud shadow cast from a cloud visible in the image

classification:bitfields.name: cloud_shadow_from_cloud_outside_image
classification:bitfields.description: Cloud shadow mask cast from a cloud located outside the image

classes.name: not_cloud_shadow_from_cloud_outside_image
classes.description: The pixel is not a cloud shadow cast from a cloud located outside in the image

classes.name: cloud_shadow_from_cloud_outside_image
classes.description: The pixel is a cloud shadow cast from a cloud located outside in the image

classes.name: not_water
classes.description: The pixel does not cover a water body

classes.name: water
classes.description: The pixel belongs to a water body

CC.title: Cloud classification
CC.description: Cloud and cloud shadow classification of the image.

CC-QA.title: Quality layer for CC
CC-QA.description: Quality layer providing basic assessment of the Cloud Classification layer quality.
